title: SubCapts
description: This mod allows you to create capture points that you can customize for yourself.
body:
SubCapts: Dynamic Capture Point Mod

This mod introduces highly flexible and simple-to-setup capture points, enabling you to create engaging and unique gameplay scenarios.

The mod is split into two parts for easy installation:

Server Component: Place this on your server.

Client Component: Place this on your client.

Once installed, use the /subcapts command in-game to open the control menu and begin creating your capture points.
